name: @act-spec/example-docusaurus-docs
description: Large Docusaurus 3.x documentation site demonstrating ACT generation across a deep sidebar hierarchy.
author: Jeremy Forsythe <jeremy@act-spec.org>

scripts.conformance: tsx scripts/generate-corpus.mts && tsx scripts/build.mts && pnpm run build:site && tsx scripts/validate.mts
scripts.test: node -e "console.log('@act-spec/example-docusaurus-docs: example exercises end-to-end via conformance')"
scripts.lint: node -e "console.log('@act-spec/example-docusaurus-docs: lint covered by typecheck + conformance')"
